wellness.title: Health & Wellness Hub
wellness.weight_advice: Your dog has gained {{amount}}kg since {{start}}. Healthy growth!

sections.vaccination_desc: Manage your pet's boosters and shots
sections.diet_desc: Log meals and track calorie intake
sections.vet_notes_desc: Store vet visit notes and reports

wellness.pro_tip_text: Regular wellness routines help you stay ahead of reminders.
wellness.dog_required_records: Please add a pet to your profile before adding health and wellness records.
wellness.dog_required_passport: Please add a pet to view their Health & Wellness passport.
wellness.setup_desc: To start tracking health and wellness records and viewing digital passports, please register a pet to your profile first.
wellness.no_insights: No wellness notes available for {{name}} yet. Add health and wellness records.
wellness.log_medications: Log medications and dosage notes from your vet.
wellness.save_notes: Save general observations and vet visit notes.

pro_tips.no_pet: Add a pet profile to unlock wellness tips based on their records, age, and upcoming due dates.
pro_tips.overdue: {{name}} has an overdue {{type}} date. Book time with a qualified vet or update the record after care is completed.
pro_tips.due_today: {{name}} has {{type}} due today. Keep the appointment or update the due date if your vet has already handled it.
pro_tips.due_soon: {{name}} has {{type}} due in {{count}} days. Set a reminder now so the appointment does not slip.
pro_tips.no_records: Start {{name}}'s passport with the most recent vaccination, vet visit, or deworming record you already have.
pro_tips.no_vaccination: {{name}} has no vaccination record yet. Add the latest vaccination details or ask your vet what is due next.
pro_tips.no_checkup: {{name}} has no checkup record yet. A routine vet visit is a useful baseline even when everything looks normal.
pro_tips.medication: Keep {{name}}'s medication notes clear: dose, timing, vet instructions, and any reaction you observe.
pro_tips.surgery: For {{name}}'s surgery history, log recovery notes and follow-up dates so your vet has a clean timeline.
pro_tips.young_pet: {{name}} is still young. Track vaccines, deworming, weight, and feeding changes closely during rapid growth.
pro_tips.senior_pet: {{name}} is in the senior range. Ask your vet how often wellness checks, dental care, and weight reviews should happen.
pro_tips.recent_record: Nice work keeping {{name}}'s records current. Add the next due date when you know it so reminders stay useful.
pro_tips.rotate_hydration: Check water intake and appetite daily. Sudden changes are worth noting and sharing with a vet if they persist.
pro_tips.rotate_body_condition: Use weight and body condition together. A stable weight can still hide gradual muscle or fat changes.
pro_tips.rotate_preventives: Parasite prevention depends on location, lifestyle, and vet guidance. Keep the next dose date in the passport.
pro_tips.rotate_notes: When you notice a new symptom, log when it started, how often it happens, and what changed around that time.

slides.title: Welcome to Lovedogs 360
slides.description: The ultimate companion app for your dog's life. Swipe to learn how to navigate the platform.

slides.title: 🐾 Health & Wellness Hub
slides.description: Keep track of vaccinations, weight growth, and vet notes. Manage your pet's wellness passport here.

slides.title: 🛒 Marketplace
slides.description: Buy and sell dog gear, or book professional grooming and training services right in your neighborhood.

slides.title: 📍 Cases & Map
slides.description: Report lost, found, injured stray, abuse, vehicle hit, rabies bite and keep the community alert.

slides.title: 💬 Community Hub
slides.description: Local and global chats and polls to build your digital pack and stay connected.

slides.title: 📅 Events
slides.description: Find Dog networking events and programs to keep your furry friend socialized.

disclaimer.title: Welcome to Lovedogs 360
disclaimer.subtitle: Before you start, please read this
disclaimer.connection_suffix: that links dog owners with independently licensed professionals and community members.
disclaimer.no_medical_bold: Lovedogs 360 does not provide diagnosis, prescriptions, emergency care, or treatment for people or pets.
disclaimer.no_medical_suffix: It connects users with independent pet-care professionals and community members who operate outside the app.
disclaimer.vet_professionals: All veterinary professionals listed on the platform are independently licensed and verified. Always consult a qualified veterinarian directly for any medical concerns about your pet.
disclaimer.community_features: Community features are for peer support and sharing. They are not a substitute for professional veterinary care.
